.. _axis:

axis
====

**axis** is a structure containing attributes for the axes of a plot.

Summary
-------

+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|keyword               |default               |attribute             |value                 |
+======================+======================+======================+======================+
|**absolute_max**      |None                  |                      |                      |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*optional*            |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*unique*              |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|**auto_scale**        |True                  |                      |                      |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*alias*               |auto                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*type*                |bool                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*unique*              |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|**horizontal**        |False                 |                      |                      |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*type*                |bool                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*unique*              |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|**max**               |None                  |                      |                      |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*alias*               |maximum               |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*optional*            |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*type*                |float                 |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*unique*              |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|**max_bound_padding** |0.1                   |                      |                      |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*type*                |float                 |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*unique*              |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|**min**               |None                  |                      |                      |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*alias*               |minimum               |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*optional*            |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*type*                |float                 |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*unique*              |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|**min_bound_padding** |0.1                   |                      |                      |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*type*                |float                 |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*unique*              |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|**other_side**        |False                 |                      |                      |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*unique*              |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|**rotation**          |None                  |                      |                      |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*optional*            |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*unique*              |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|**scale**             |linear                |                      |                      |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*unique*              |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*validate*            |ValidateChoice        |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |                      |linear                |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |                      |log                   |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |                      |symlog                |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|**step**              |None                  |                      |                      |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*optional*            |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*type*                |float                 |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*unique*              |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|**tick_label_size**   |None                  |                      |                      |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*optional*            |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*unique*              |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|**title_size**        |None                  |                      |                      |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*unique*              |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|**zoom**              |1.0                   |                      |                      |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
|                      |                      |*unique*              |True                  |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+

Keywords
--------

absolute_max
^^^^^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

this ensures that the maximum value of the axis will be at least that value

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

auto_scale
^^^^^^^^^^

default: **True**

if set to False, both the attributes min and max need to be specified. The user does not normally need to set that attribute

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |auto                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|type                                             |bool                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

horizontal
^^^^^^^^^^

default: **False**

this is used internally to know if the axis is the xaxis or the yaxis

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|type                                             |bool                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

max
^^^

default: **None**

maximum value for that axis in user coordinates. It is calculated.

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |maximum                                          |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|type                                             |float                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

max_bound_padding
^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

default: **0.1**

this determines the padding to add over the max value of the axis, it is a percentage of max-min. If min = 0 and max = 10, the actual max will be 11.

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|type                                             |float                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

min
^^^

default: **None**

minimum value for that axis in user coordinates. It is calculated.

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |minimum                                          |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|type                                             |float                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

min_bound_padding
^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

default: **0.1**

this determines the padding to add below the min value of the axis, it is a percentage of max-min. If min = 0 and max = 10, the actual min will be -1, set it to 0 to get the axis to start at 0

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|type                                             |float                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

other_side
^^^^^^^^^^

default: **False**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

rotation
^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

scale
^^^^^

default: **linear**

type of scale to be used along that axis: linear, logarithmic or symlog, please refer to matplotlib

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|validate                                         |ValidateChoice                                   |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |linear                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |log                                              |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |symlog                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

step
^^^^

default: **None**

the step to use between min and max for that axis. By default, it is calculated to set a tick for each value in the dataset

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|type                                             |float                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

tick_label_size
^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

title_size
^^^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

zoom
^^^^

default: **1.0**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

generated on 2012-11-04 20:07:39
